Operation 'removeMailUser' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The description lacks critical details about what input is required (email address), what the operation returns, and important side effects (permanent deletion of mail data). Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and consequences.

data.current_description: Removes an existing mail user.
data.description_suggestion: Removes an existing mail user from the system. Requires the email address of the user to be removed. This operation permanently deletes the user account and all associated mail data. Returns a success confirmation message. Requires administrative privileges.
data.reasoning: The description lacks critical details about what input is required (email address), what the operation returns, and important side effects (permanent deletion of mail data). Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and consequences.

message: Operation 'addMailUserPrivilege' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about required inputs (email and privilege type), what the operation returns (updated user object), and context about multiple privilege support. Improved summary to be more action-oriented for AI agent interpretation.

data.current_description: Adds a privilege to an existing mail user.
data.description_suggestion: Grants a specified privilege to an existing mail user. Requires the user's email address and the privilege type to be added (e.g., admin, forwarding). Returns the updated user object with the new privilege included. Multiple privileges can be assigned to a single user.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. Added clarity about required inputs (email and privilege type), what the operation returns (updated user object), and context about multiple privilege support. Improved summary to be more action-oriented for AI agent interpretation.

message: Operation 'removeMailUserPrivilege' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about required inputs (email and privilege type) and what is returned. Added these details and clarified the precondition that the privilege must exist. Improved summary to use more precise action verb for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Removes a privilege from an existing mail user.
data.description_suggestion: Revokes a specified privilege from an existing mail user. Requires the user's email address and the privilege type to be removed. Returns the updated user object with the privilege removed. The user must have the privilege assigned before removal.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about required inputs (email and privilege type) and what is returned. Added these details and clarified the precondition that the privilege must exist. Improved summary to use more precise action verb for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'setMailUserPassword' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is incomplete. Added required inputs (email and password), return value, password requirements context, and important side effect (session invalidation). Improved summary to be more specific about the action for better AI agent interpretation.

data.current_description: Sets a password for an existing mail user.
data.description_suggestion: Updates the password for an existing mail user. Requires the user's email address and the new password. Returns a success confirmation message. The new password must meet system security requirements. This operation invalidates any existing sessions for the user.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete. Added required inputs (email and password), return value, password requirements context, and important side effect (session invalidation). Improved summary to be more specific about the action for better AI agent interpretation.

message: Operation 'getMailUserPrivileges' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity about required input parameter (email address) and details about the response structure. Added parameter requirement and response format details to improve AI agent understanding of what data is needed and what will be returned.

data.current_description: Returns all privileges for an existing mail user.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all privileges assigned to a specific mail user. Requires the user's email address as a parameter. Returns an array of privilege objects, each containing the privilege type and any associated metadata. Returns an empty array if the user has no privileges assigned.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required input parameter (email address) and details about the response structure. Added parameter requirement and response format details to improve AI agent understanding of what data is needed and what will be returned.

message: Operation 'getMailAliases' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks details about the optional filtering capability (domain parameter) and response structure. Added parameter context and response format details to help AI agents understand how to use this operation effectively and what data will be returned.

data.current_description: Returns all mail aliases.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all mail aliases configured in the system. Optionally filters results by domain using a query parameter. Returns an array of alias objects, each containing the alias email address, target address(es), and status. Can be used to list all aliases or aliases for a specific mail domain.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about the optional filtering capability (domain parameter) and response structure. Added parameter context and response format details to help AI agents understand how to use this operation effectively and what data will be returned.

data.current_description: Returns all custom A records for the specified query name.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all custom DNS A records for the specified query name (qname). Returns an array of custom A record objects containing the record values and metadata. Requires authentication.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about input parameter (qname) and output format. Added explicit mention of qname parameter, return type (array of objects), and authentication requirement for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Adds a custom DNS record for the specified query name and type.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new custom DNS record for the specified query name (qname) and record type (rtype). Requires the record value in the request body. Duplicate records for the same qname and rtype are not allowed.

data.current_description: Removes a DNS custom record for the specified domain, type & value.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a custom DNS record identified by query name (qname), record type (rtype), and record value. The operation fails if no matching record exists with the specified combination of qname, rtype, and value.
